summary: Jane is multi-tenant (one subdomain + patient account per clinic) and auth is a Rails two-step username/password form yielding a _front_desk_session cookie. A regen must keep a per-clinic profile store that overrides base_url + session at client-build time, and a hand-rolled 2-step login, not the generic single-tenant cookie-from-Chrome flow.
reason: The generator assumes one base_url and standard cookie/token auth. Jane needs per-clinic base URLs resolved from a 'clinic' store, and login must POST /sign_in twice (auth_key then auth_key+identifier+password) because there is no token API.
validated_outcome: Public reads (locations/disciplines/treatments/staff/openings) and next-opening (paging past Jane's 7-day window cap) verified live against embophysio.janeapp.com and leahkangas.janeapp.com. Two-step login handshake and write endpoints (book/reschedule/cancel) require a live patient session to finalize; writes ship dry-run-by-default behind --confirm.
